mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, name, phone, address, role, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{role}, #{active}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
